text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her humiliating defeat in the exhibition
race, Symboli Rudolf no longer believes she
deserves to call herself the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But despite her bitter tears, I gently reassure her
that she was, and still is, worthy. And, as if to
prove it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lifts her head to see a crowd of Umamusume.
The students she devoted herself to have turned
out in force to support her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fierce will blazes in her eyes once more as she
remembers what it truly means to be the Emperor.
